textRun.content: The automated outreach system isn’t working is what I meant, I was setting up an AI to do the outreach for me, but it’s not yet working those 30 pieces of outreach that I did were manual through Instagram DM’s to people who follow me. 3 of them actually used ICP language.
I was discussing this previously with an Alex Hormozi GPT, here’s information on that:
Alright — this is one of the most important things we can do right now.
Because what we’ve done in this conversation is not random.
We’ve actually built a full business from scratch — correctly sequenced.
I’m going to walk you through this like I would if we were sitting in a room and I was breaking down your first company.
🧠 PHASE 1 — YOU HAD VISION (BUT TOO COMPLEX)
•	a massive system (Game of Lyfe, LyfeOS, fractal frameworks)
•	strong intention to build a movement
You were trying to build Stage 5 before Stage 1 worked
This is what almost every smart founder does.
🔥 PHASE 2 — WE IDENTIFIED THE REAL GAME
One offer. One ICP. One problem. One action.
“I need to get people results and get paid.”
Ambitious young men frustrated with themselves because they lack discipline and are wasting their potential
Lack of structure → leads to drift
This came directly from your outreach conversations.
We stripped away all complexity and built:
This is now a sellable offer.
This gives your program meaning beyond content.
Now you have a real revenue engine.
From your actual conversations, we learned:
⚡ PHASE 3 — YOU HIT THE EXECUTION WALL
This is where you are now.
•	“I know what to do but I’m not doing it”
That’s the moment every founder hits.
And we reframed your identity to:
🧩 WHAT YOU NOW HAVE (THIS IS BIG)
Most people never reach this clarity.
For the next 30 days, you do NOT need:
Let me tell you something I learned the hard way.
When I started, I thought I needed:
Your entire business right now is:
That’s how you become the person you said:
